decision.reason: The first operational version should validate scenario quality and partial-credit rubrics before adding a more complex best-vs-likely interpretation layer.

partial_credit.label: high_risk_or_low_quality_response
partial_credit.description: Likely to escalate, ignore key emotional information, violate boundaries, or close down repair.

partial_credit.label: low_effectiveness_response
partial_credit.description: Addresses part of the situation but misses important emotional, relational, or boundary information.

partial_credit.label: partially_effective_response
partial_credit.description: Uses a plausible strategy with some tradeoffs or missing follow-through.

partial_credit.label: high_quality_response
partial_credit.description: Balances emotional information, boundaries, clarity, and next-step usefulness for the scenario.

strategy_scores.meaning: How well the response uses emotional and contextual cues before acting.
How well the response reduces impulsive escalation under pressure.
How well the response acknowledges emotion without over-rescuing.
How well the response expresses limits or needs with respect.
How well the response supports recovery after misunderstanding, harm, or tension.
How well the response moves collaboration toward clear and actionable next steps.
